title: LADBS SFD fire-rebuild (Pacific Palisades) — real examiner corrections
notes: Ground truth from a REAL LADBS plan-check correction set (158 corrections, anonymized). Models the AS-SUBMITTED (R1) plan: items the examiner flagged as missing are omitted from plan_text and expected to FAIL; items shown on the submittal are present and expected to PASS. Tests whether the deterministic engine reproduces a real LADBS examiner's LA-specific corrections on an SFD.

plan_data.project_address: 100 Hillside Dr, Pacific Palisades, Los Angeles, CA 90272

plan_text: TITLE SHEET A001 — Single-Family Residence (owner redacted), Pacific Palisades, Los Angeles, CA 90272. New single-family dwelling, fire rebuild. Occupancy R-3, Construction Type V-B, 2 stories, 30 ft. CODE ANALYSIS: occupancy classification R-3, construction type V-B per CRC. SITE PLAN A1101: property lines shown with setbacks to front, side and rear. Grading and drainage per civil. Architectural floor plans, elevations, sections.
